response.justification: The candidate far exceeds the technical bar — 15+ years of fullstack work with strong TypeScript/Node.js, React exposure, testing discipline, and even the nice-to-have LLM/MCP and Kubernetes experience. However, this is an entry-level position and the candidate is a Staff/Senior engineer, creating a serious overqualification risk around compensation expectations, engagement, and retention. Additionally, the resume lists Bangalore as location while the role demands high on-site presence, and PostgreSQL/Nest.js are not explicitly evidenced.
strengths: Deep TypeScript/Node.js fullstack experience across product and platform work
Hands-on LLM/AI-agent tooling (MCP) and Kubernetes experience matching nice-to-haves
Strong engineering craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, clean architecture advocacy
concerns: Heavily overqualified for an entry-level role — retention and salary-fit risk
Based in Bangalore while the role requires high on-site presence
No explicit PostgreSQL or Nest.js experience shown (MongoDB/MySQL and Ember dominate)

key_factors.factor: Technical stack alignment (TypeScript, fullstack, LLM tooling)
